[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title="Fast Turnaround Time" use_icon="on" font_icon="||fa||900" icon_color="#27cb8b" icon_placement="left" content_max_width="100%" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" header_font="Merriweather||||||||" header_font_size="22px" body_font="Lato|700|||||||" body_text_color="#000000" global_colors_info="{}"]Fill critical roles within days, not weeks, with our agile recruitment model.[/et_pb_blurb][dipl_button _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_button_item button_text="Start Hiring Today" background_fill_style="slide_right_fill" button_bg_color="#27cb8b" button_use_icon="on" button_icon="||divi||400" button_icon_color="#FFFFFF" button_on_hover="off" button_custom_padding="12px|30px|12px|30px|true|true" _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" button_font="Merriweather||||||||" button_text_color="#FFFFFF" border_radii="on|8px|8px|8px|8px" global_colors_info="{}" button_bg_color__hover_enabled="on|hover" button_bg_color__hover="#000000" button_bg_enable_color__hover="on" button_icon__hover_enabled="on|hover" button_icon__hover="||divi||400"][/dipl_button_item][/dipl_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
